penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out and freed from the gauze by the end of the video sequence.

reasoning: The video shows clear cutting activity around a marked circle on gauze material. The performer demonstrates proper traction setup and begins cutting from the edge as required. However, the final frame shows the circle is not completely freed from the gauze material, constituting an incomplete task. Due to the incomplete nature of the circle cutting, a major penalty deduction was applied.
